_doc: Signature-decoration registry (composition-DNA lever #3) — the palette of decorative DEVICES a theme can declare as its signature, cataloged from the 34-template study (docs/REFERENCE_TEMPLATE_ANALYSIS.md, the ~10 motif groups G1-G10). A device is a named, positionable, token-driven primitive. A theme.json declares `decoration: [<device-id>, ...]`; compose.py's _theme_decorations renders the declared devices as a canvas-wide overlay in the theme's own tokens. `kind`: shared = a reusable parameterized primitive (same executor, theme palette varies it); signature = an identity-defining device. `scope`: frame = canvas-wide (always-on furniture); scene = tied to a scene's content (not yet wired). Every device here MUST have a renderer in compose._DECOR_RENDERERS (honesty-tested), and every theme's declared devices must be ids in here.

graph-paper.purpose: a ruled graph-paper grid wash — engineering / technical / trend-index register (blueprint, cobalt-grid).

scanlines.purpose: CRT / terminal scanline overlay — retro-digital / phosphor register (terminal-green, 8-bit, retro-windows).

grain.purpose: fractal print grain — paper / riso / photographic register; the single most common signature texture. Near-universal in the reference decks.

dot-grid.purpose: a faint dot-grid wash — quiet structured paper (block-frame, blue-professional).

corner-brackets.purpose: L-shaped marks at the four corners that imply a frame without enclosing it (8-bit-orbit, block-frame).

interior-frame.purpose: a hairline border inset ~4% — a poster / placard 'design within a design' (pink-script, peoples-platform, signal).

rail-label.purpose: a vertical rotated wayfinder label along the left edge — magazine-spine metadata (biennale-yellow, cobalt-grid).

params.text: the label string (default a generic marker)

background-ordinal.purpose: a giant low-opacity numeral/char behind content (bottom-right) — chapter identity + region fill (grove, emerald-editorial, biennale).

blob.purpose: soft organic blob masses at the corners — friendly / playful / kawaii (playful, pastel-dream, daisy-days).

ribbon.purpose: diagonal multi-colour bands sweeping across the canvas — zine / expressive atmospheric layer (sakura-chroma, retro-zine).

glow.purpose: an off-centre radial bloom/halo — the primary depth mechanism in shadowless dark systems (pink-script, aurora, biennale).

seal.purpose: a rotated circular rubber-stamp / seal mark (top-right) — 'officially marked' authority (pin-and-paper, sakura, creative-mode).

compass-rings.purpose: concentric + dashed drafting arcs in a corner — cartesian/blueprint drafting furniture (blueprint, indigo-porcelain).

pillar-panels.purpose: vertical accent side-panels + hairlines — bauhaus/bold-poster architecture (bold-signal, bauhaus-bold).

letterpress.purpose: a giant faint background word with a stacked 3D offset shadow — poster/manifesto (bold-signal, bauhaus-bold).

scribbles.purpose: hand-drawn squiggles + a star — playful/classroom marks (chalk-garden).

tape.purpose: semi-transparent collage tape strips at two corners — zine/kraft scrapbook furniture (sunset-zine, kraft-paper).

starfield.purpose: deterministic scattered pixel stars — 8-bit / cyber field (neon-cyber).

os-chrome.purpose: a retro window title-bar with traffic-light dots — OS / terminal chrome (terminal-green, retro-windows).

rosette-seal.purpose: an ornate concentric stamp (solid + dashed + inner rings) — kraft / sakura seal, richer than seal (kraft-paper).

double-rule.purpose: a top + bottom pair of hairlines bracketing the content — editorial ornament (vintage-editorial).

hatch.purpose: 45deg diagonal line texture — coral / split-canvas panel fill (split-canvas).

pixel-brackets.purpose: blocky stepped corner brackets (filled L's) — pixel-native marks (neon-cyber, 8-bit).

drop-cap.purpose: an oversized decorative initial in the upper-left — zine / soft-editorial (sunset-zine, paper-press).
